title: RUSTINS Matt Emulsion Paint Magnolia 250ml
description: From the manufacturer About Us Sidney's father was a cabinetmaker and his mother funded the business venture with 50 pounds. During the second world war the first night raid destroyed the original 1932 factory and the business moved to its present location in Cricklewood, London. Ronnie Rustin, Sidney's son, took over the business and ran it until his death in 2008. He drove the growth of Rustins to be one of the good brands in the industry with a focus on wood finishing products, speciality paints and decorating sundries. RUSTINS Matt Emulsion Magnolia 250ml Rustins Quick Dry Matt Emulsion Paint is a quick drying good performance paint that dries to a smooth matt finish. For interior use on areas they have been exposed to wear and tear that need touching up.
